{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "855455ca",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Wakefield and impedance (ABCI)\n",
    "\n",
    "The wakefield solver runs the bunch through the cavity and reports the wake potentials and the beam-coupling impedance. cavsim2d drives the **ABCI** time-domain solver behind a backend-agnostic interface (`cav.wakefield`). ABCI needs beam pipes at both ends, so the cavity is built with `beampipe='both'`.\n",
    "\n",
    "> This example needs the bundled `ABCI.exe` (Windows, or `wine` elsewhere) — see the installation page.\n",
    "\n",
    "See the [wakefield guide](../../wakefield)."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "6806cbc4",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:09:25.544763Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:09:25.544632Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.115967Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.115150Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import os\n",
    "import tempfile\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from cavsim2d import EllipticalCavity\n",
    "from cavsim2d.utils.style import apply_style\n",
    "\n",
    "apply_style()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "498a4f07",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 1. The cavity"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "32e7346b",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.118574Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.118282Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.228985Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.228533Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x300 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='$z$ [mm]', ylabel='$r$ [mm]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "midcell = [42, 42, 12, 19, 35, 57.7, 103.353]\n",
    "cav = EllipticalCavity(1, midcell, midcell, midcell, beampipe='both', name='wake')\n",
    "cav.set_workspace(os.path.join(tempfile.mkdtemp(), 'wake'))\n",
    "\n",
    "cav.plot('geometry')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "c3cbb7bc",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 2. Run the wakefield solve\n",
    "\n",
    "`MROT=2` computes both the longitudinal and transverse polarisations; `wakelength` is the length of wake to compute [m] and `bunch_length` the rms bunch length [mm]."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "dfcb53cc",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.230793Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:09:27.230624Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:10:21.608664Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:10:21.608177Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "{'|k_loss| [V/pC]': 0.1803,\n",
       " 'k_FM [V/pC]': 0.14338,\n",
       " 'k_loss_HOM [V/pC]': 0.03691999999999998,\n",
       " '|k_kick| [V/pC/m]': 5.774}"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.run({'MROT': 2, 'wakelength': 20, 'bunch_length': 25})\n",
    "cav.wakefield.qois"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "dda4d960",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 3. Impedance spectra\n",
    "\n",
    "The longitudinal impedance $|Z_\\parallel|$ vs frequency (its peaks are the cavity's higher-order modes):"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "8e608c04",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:10:21.610209Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-18T17:10:21.610073Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-18T17:10:22.088323Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-18T17:10:22.087779Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Axes: xlabel='f [MHz]', ylabel='$|Z_\\\\parallel|$ [k$\\\\Omega$]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 4,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.plot_impedance('longitudinal')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d5df5579",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "The transverse (dipole) impedance $|Z_\\perp|$:"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "5e30c446",
   "metadata": {

    },

     "data": {
      "text/plain": [

      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 5,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.plot_impedance('transverse')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f75d249d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## 4. Wake potential and loss factor\n",
    "\n",
    "The longitudinal wake potential behind the bunch head:"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "2f15b4d6",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-18T17:10:22.157074Z",

       "<Axes: title={'center': 'Longitudinal wake'}, xlabel='S [m]', ylabel='$W_\\\\parallel$ [V/pC]'>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 6,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "cav.wakefield.plot_wake('longitudinal')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "59835988",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [

  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3ad2d0ec",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Compare with the eigenmode reconstruction\n",
    "\n",
    "The eigenmode solver reconstructs the same impedance from its modes — `cav.eigenmode.plot_impedance()` — on the same axes as `cav.wakefield.plot_impedance()` (both default to kOhm) they can be overlaid; see the [eigenmode example](../eigenmode/elliptical_tesla.ipynb)."
   ]
  }
 ],
